summary: Tested Profile page features: login, /api/auth/me endpoint returning rooms_joined, rooms_created, badges_earned, and badge display (earned=colored, unearned=transparent). All tests passed.

login: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
badges_logic: popular badge NOT earned when followers < 10
verified badge NOT earned when conditions not met
legend badge NOT earned when conditions not met
profile_page_ui: 4 stats display correctly: followers=3, following=4, coins=1000, rooms=0
Earned badges (speaker, room_owner, star) appear colored
Unearned badges (popular, verified, legend) appear faded/transparent

badge_conditions_verified.speaker: Always earned - WORKING
badge_conditions_verified.room_owner: Earned when rooms_created > 0 - WORKING (user has 2 rooms)
badge_conditions_verified.popular: Earned when followers >= 10 - WORKING (user has 3, not earned)
badge_conditions_verified.star: Earned when coins >= 100 - WORKING (user has 1000, earned)
badge_conditions_verified.verified: Earned when followers >= 50 AND rooms_joined >= 5 - WORKING (not earned)
badge_conditions_verified.legend: Earned when followers >= 100 AND coins >= 1000 AND rooms_joined >= 20 - WORKING (not earned)

critical_code_review_comments: Badge logic in /api/auth/me correctly calculates badges based on real database data
ProfilePage.js correctly uses badges_earned array from API to determine badge display
Badge component uses opacity-40 class for unearned badges (earned=true shows full color, earned=false shows faded)
Stats are fetched from API and displayed with real values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page badges feature fully tested and working. API /auth/me returns rooms_joined, rooms_created, badges_earned. Frontend correctly displays earned badges as colored and unearned as transparent. User naifliver@gmail.com has: followers=3, rooms_created=2, coins=1000, rooms_joined=0.
